description: Compact index of all lessons under .claude/skills/self-evolution/lessons/. Read this file at the start of any task to know what pitfalls and hard-won knowledge exist. Fetch individual lesson files only when the topic is relevant.

lessons.description: slicer.app.restart() with --python-script re-runs the same script, causing an infinite restart loop; fix with a flag file written BEFORE calling restart()

SAT inference env: cu128 PyTorch for RTX 5090 sm_120 Blackwell, numpy<2.0 pin for MONAI 1.1.0, DDP identity wrapper for single-GPU, torch.load weights_only=False patch, HuggingFace URL bug workaround, SAT JSONL input format and checkpoint layout

Phase 3+4 bugs: missing --text_encoder ours causes KeyError; JSONL in out_dir causes SameFileError; Slicer NIfTI export with saveNode; loadLabelVolume for mask import; start_server.sh must cd to Segmentation/ for imports
